title: UP Board Results 2026: Meet Sitapur Girls Kashish And Shikha, Toppers With Over 97% Marks
description: UP Board Results 2026 Toppers: In the Class 10 exam, Kashish Verma from Sitapur secured the top position jointly with Anshika Verma from Barabanki, both scoring 97.83%. In Class 12, Shikha Verma from Sitapur emerged as the state topper with 97.60%.
